text.title: Meta Ads Reporting and Diagnosis Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pull-metrics
step.action: Pull preset (CPM, CTR, CPC, CVR, CPA, ROAS, Frequency, Spend) for the period.

step.name: run-breakdowns
step.action: Run breakdown by age, placement, device, country; flag segments >25% off average.

step.name: diagnose
step.action: Map each surfaced issue to root cause from the standard map.
step.decision-gate: If no root cause assignable, STOP and gather more data; do not invent.

step.name: rank-actions
step.action: Top-5 actions ranked by expected CPA/ROAS impact × owner availability.

step.name: publish
step.action: Ship Markdown to stakeholders + JSON to ops queue.
